phrases.intent_en: Ask where to watch the race
phrases.cultural_note: The Monaco Grand Prix takes place in late May. The best viewing spots are the Harbourfront, Casino Square, and the Fairmont Hairpin.

responses.english: From the port or Casino Square. Grandstand seats book in advance.
responses.phonetic: say par lah, zhoost oh boo duh lah roo
responses.french: Depuis le port ou la place du Casino. Les tribunes se réservent à l'avance.

phrases.text_local: Quand a lieu le Grand Prix cette année ?
phrases.pronunciation: kohn ah lee-OOO luh grahn PREE set ah-NAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Monaco Grand Prix is typically held on the last weekend of May. Check the official Formula 1 calendar for exact dates each year.

responses.english: Late May, usually. Check the official calendar.
responses.french: Fin mai, en général. Vérifiez le calendrier officiel.

phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le virage en épingle à cheveux ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo seh TROOV luh vee-RAZH on zah-PANGL ah shuh-VOO
phrases.cultural_note: The Fairmont Hairpin (Turn 6) is the most iconic corner — drivers slow to under 50 km/h. The grandstand here offers close-up action.

responses.english: Near the Fairmont Hotel, right there.
responses.french: Près de l'hôtel Fairmont, juste là.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy Grand Prix tickets
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on acheter des billets pour le Grand Prix ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TOHN ah-shuh-TAY day bee-YAY poor luh grahn PREE
phrases.cultural_note: Tickets sell out months ahead. The official F1 website and Automobile Club de Monaco are the main outlets.

responses.english: Online, on the official website. You need to book well in advance.
responses.phonetic: ahn LEEN-yuh, soor luh SEET oh-fee-SYEL. eel foh ray-zair-VAY lohn-TAHN ah lah-VAHNS
responses.french: En ligne, sur le site officiel. Il faut réserver longtemps à l'avance.

phrases.text_local: Peut-on marcher sur le circuit en dehors du Grand Prix ?
phrases.pronunciation: puh-TOHN mar-SHAY soor luh see-mee duh-DOR doo grahn PREE
phrases.cultural_note: Outside race days, you can walk parts of the circuit (Casino Square, Harbourfront). Some sections remain closed to the public.

responses.english: Yes, it's a public road outside of race events.
responses.phonetic: wee, luh seer-KWEE rest oon vwah pub-LEEK or koors
responses.french: Oui, c'est une voie publique en dehors des courses.

vocabulary.word_local: le virage en épingle à cheveux
vocabulary.pronunciation: luh vee-RAZH on zah-PANGL ah shuh-VOO
